title: Nerolac Select is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Nerolac Select is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Nerolac Select are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nerolac Select:
Nerolac Select is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nerolac Select!
